delta.text: I see
the new contact form with fields for 姓名 (name), 公司 (company), 职
位 (position), and 手机/电话 (phone). The name field is focused. I
need to expand the name field to enter first and last name separately, or
just type "Bob Smith" directly. Let me first check
if there's an expand button for the name field. I see a
dropdown icon (◇) next to 姓名. Let me click that to expand the name into
first/last name fields.

content.text: I see the new contact form with fields for 姓名 (name), 公司 (company), 职位 (position), and 手机/电话 (phone). The name field is focused.
